memoryArtifacts.headline: Gilbert de Culcheth
memoryArtifacts.description:
Note:

Military tenant of Sir William le Boteler, Baron of Warrington.

Gilbert was murdered in 1275, by unknown malefactors, as the township made no pursuit, it was fined.
He left behind four infant …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Culcheth於大約1205年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Henry de Culcheth32歲，母親Baroness Cecilia de Lathom22歲。他於1238年與Lady Cecelia de Lathom在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1269年登記服兵役。他去世於1275年在英國藍卡爾沃林頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Culcheth于大约1205年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Henry de Culcheth32岁，母亲Baroness Cecilia de Lathom22岁。他于1238年与Lady Cecelia de Lathom在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1269年登记服兵役。他去世于1275年在英国藍卡爾沃林頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Culcheth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Culcheth was born about 1205, in Cheshire, England, his father, Henry de Culcheth, was 32 and his mother, Baroness Cecilia de Lathom, was 22. He married Lady Cecelia de Lathom in 1238, in Lathom House, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1269. He died in 1275, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Culcheth est né environ 1205, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Culcheth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cecilia de Lathom, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecelia de Lathom en 1238, à Lathom House, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1269. Il est décédé en 1275, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Culcheth um 1205 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Culcheth 32 und seine Mutter Baroness Cecilia de Lathom 22. Er hat 1238 in Lathom House, Lancashire, England Lady Cecelia de Lathom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1269 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Warrington, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Culcheth è nato il circa 1205 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Culcheth, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Cecilia de Lathom, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecelia de Lathom nel 1238, nel Lathom House, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1269. Morì nel 1275, nel Warrington, Lancashire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Culchethが約1205年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Culchethは32歳，母Baroness Cecilia de Lathomは22歳であった。1238年にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム ホーウゼでLady Cecelia de Lathomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1269年に兵役登録をした。彼は1275年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Culcheth(이)가 대략 1205년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Culcheth(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Cecilia de Lathom(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1238년 영국 랭카실르 래톰 허스에서 Lady Cecelia de Lathom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1269년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1275년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Culcheth nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Culcheth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Cecilia de Lathom, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecelia de Lathom em 1238, em Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1269. Ele faleceu em 1275, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Culcheth родился около 1205 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Culcheth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cecilia de Lathom, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecelia de Lathom в 1238 г. в местности латом хоус, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. В 1269 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1275 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert de Culcheth nació aproximadamente 1205, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Culcheth, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Baroness Cecilia de Lathom, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Cecelia de Lathom en 1238, en Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1269. Murió en 1275, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
